---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a parity improvement or a carefully scoped enhancement / 提交一致性改进或谨慎范围内的增强建议
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary / 需求概述

What change are you asking for?  
你希望补什么能力？

## Why It Matters / 为什么值得做

Explain the practical value.  
请说明这个改动的实际价值。

## Parity Or New Behavior / 原版一致性还是新增行为

- [ ] This is restoring or aligning an existing Hermes Desktop behavior
- [ ] This is a new behavior not present in the official Electron app

## Proposed Behavior / 期望行为

Describe the behavior as concretely as possible.  
请尽量具体地描述期望行为。

## Extra Context / 补充信息

Add screenshots, references, workflow notes, or related links if helpful.  
如果有帮助，请补截图、参考链接或工作流说明。
